zh.lifeSummary: 當Graf Johann II von Oldenburg於1272年出生在德國尼德薩辛歐登伯格時，他的父親Graf Christian III von Oldenburg43歲，母親Hedwig von Oldenburg-Wildeshausen39歲。他於1290年與Hedwig von Diepholz在德國尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 迪福爾茲結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1316年11月22日在他的家鄉享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Graf Johann II von Oldenburg于1272年出生在德国尼德薩辛歐登伯格时，他的父亲Graf Christian III von Oldenburg43岁，母亲Hedwig von Oldenburg-Wildeshausen39岁。他于1290年与Hedwig von Diepholz在德国尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 迪福爾茲结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1316年11月22日在他的家乡享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Oldenburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Erwin, Fritz, Otto, Claus, Hans, Jurgen, Ruediger.

North German, Dutch, Danish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Oldenburg, the capital of the former principality of the same name, from the weak dative case (originally used after a preposition and article) of Middle Low German ald, old ‘old’ + burg ‘fortress, fortified town’.

nameMeanings.name: Johann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Graf Johann II von Oldenburg was born in 1272, in Oldenburg, Lower Saxony, Germany, his father, Graf Christian III von Oldenburg, was 43 and his mother, Hedwig von Oldenburg-Wildeshausen, was 39. He married Hedwig von Diepholz in 1290, in Diepholz, Lower Saxony, Germany. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 22 November 1316, in his hometown, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Graf Johann II von Oldenburg est né en 1272, à Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Allemagne, son père, Graf Christian III von Oldenburg, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Hedwig von Oldenburg-Wildeshausen, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Hedwig von Diepholz en 1290, à Landkreis Diepholz, Niedersachsen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 22 novembre 1316, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Graf Johann II von Oldenburg 1272 in Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Graf Christian III von Oldenburg 43 und seine Mutter Hedwig von Oldenburg-Wildeshausen 39. Er hat 1290 in Landkreis Diepholz, Niedersachsen, Deutschland Hedwig von Diepholz geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 22. November 1316 im Alter von 44 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Graf Johann II von Oldenburg è nato il nel 1272 nel Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Germania, il suo padre, Graf Christian III von Oldenburg, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Hedwig von Oldenburg-Wildeshausen, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Hedwig von Diepholz nel 1290, nel Landkreis Diepholz, Niedersachsen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 22 novembre 1316, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Graf Johann II von Oldenburgが1272年にドイツニーダーサチセンオルデンブルグで生まれた時，父Graf Christian III von Oldenburgは43歳，母Hedwig von Oldenburg-Wildeshausenは39歳であった。1290年にドイツニーダーサチセンランドクレイス ディエフォルズでHedwig von Diepholzと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1316年11月22日に故郷で44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Graf Johann II von Oldenburg(이)가 1272년 독일 니더작센 덴버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Graf Christian III von Oldenburg(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Hedwig von Oldenburg-Wildeshausen(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1290년 독일 니더작센 랜드크레이스 디포즈에서 Hedwig von Diepholz(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1316년 11월 22일 그의 고향에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Graf Johann II von Oldenburg nasceu em 1272, em Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Graf Christian III von Oldenburg, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Hedwig von Oldenburg-Wildeshausen, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Hedwig von Diepholz em 1290, em Landkreis Diepholz, Niedersachsen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de novembro de 1316, em sua cidade natal, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Graf Johann II von Oldenburg родился в 1272 г. в местности олденбург, ниедирсачсен, Германия, его отцу по имени Graf Christian III von Oldenburg было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Hedwig von Oldenburg-Wildeshausen, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Hedwig von Diepholz в 1290 г. в местности ландкрис диефолз, ниедирсачсен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 22 ноября 1316 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Graf Johann II von Oldenburg nació en 1272, en Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Alemania, su papá, Graf Christian III von Oldenburg, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Hedwig von Oldenburg-Wildeshausen, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Hedwig von Diepholz en 1290, en Landkreis Diepholz, Niedersachsen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 22 de noviembre de 1316, en su pueblo, a la edad de 44 años.
